case_title: VULCAN THREADED PRODUCTS VS MBR SYSTEMS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VULCAN THREADED PRODUCTS AS TO DEFENDANT MBR SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VULCAN THREADED PRODUCTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MBR SYSTEMS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,029.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
